reviews.review_description: there is absolutely nothing to do minus make a burger and buy a gun thats it and the map is very small

there's no buildings nothing to really complain about because there's literally no buildings like why only three and how do you even become a cop there's no cop hirings only burger 1 star and i don't know why but at the boat at the bottom of the picture it says that you can get hired as a cop and there's no one even playing it's empty in the mid with unity makes it even worse because of how bad unity is and people are saying that it's five stars when it's truly trash empty no one playing at all oh it also says when you join then it will say activate mic when there's no one to even talk to
I haven’t played but it sounds fun like actually getting  a job in a vr. And robbing and being a cop.
